nodes.label: evocore v3 Design Spec
nodes.summary: Design replacing mutable RNG state with hierarchical derive_seed and consolidating GA reproduction into a single Rust call.

nodes.label: Hierarchical seed derivation
nodes.summary: All random decisions derive from master_seed, generation, individual index, and operation type to guarantee thread-count-independent reproducibility.

edges.rationale: The v3 spec states that it supersedes the v2 design.
The v3 core change replaces RNG state with derive_seed.
